@commandPalette.searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the command palette's search input, shown when it's empty. The command palette is a Spotlight-style popup for finding and running commands. The trailing "..." suggests typing; keep it.

@commandPalette.searchAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (read by screen readers) for the command palette's search input.

@commandPalette.noResults.description: Empty-state message shown in the command palette when a search matches no commands.

@commandPalette.resultsAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (read by screen readers) for the command palette's results list.

@commandPalette.groupRecent.description: Heading above the recently-used commands at the top of the command palette (shown when the search box is empty). A short section label.

@commandPalette.groupAll.description: Heading above the full command list in the command palette, shown below the "Recent" group. A short section label.
